_comment: Manually moderated testimonials. Schema per entry: { name, role, link, link_label, rating (1-5), quote, source ('site' | 'wp-admin' | 'wp-org' | 'g2' | 'capterra'), date (YYYY-MM-DD), published (true/false), reply (optional admin response) }. Only entries with published=true render on the site. Newest dates appear first. Empty until real, verified reviews come in — no seed/sample quotes.
